questionHtml:
What is the name of this compound, applying IUPAC rules?

A.  4-methylhex-2-ene

B.  4-ethylpent-2-ene

C.  2-ethylpent-3-ene

D.  3-methylhex-4-ene

meta.title: What is the name of this compound, applying IUPAC rules? A. 4-methylhex-2-ene B. 4-ethylpent-2-ene C. 2-ethylpent-3-ene D. 3-methylhex-4-ene
